text.title: Interest and Behavior Targeting
text.summary: Interest lookup API, behavior targeting, and flexible/layered logic operators for Meta ad sets.

rule.statement: Look up interest IDs via the search API before hardcoding them — interest IDs do not change but names and audience sizes do.
rule.rationale: Using stale interest data from documentation produces silent mismatches; the search API returns current size bounds needed for audience sizing decisions.

example.note: Response includes audience_size_lower_bound and upper_bound — use these to verify size is in the 500K-5M target range.

section.title: Layered Targeting (AND Logic)
section.p: All conditions in the root targeting object use AND logic — users must match all criteria.

example.note: Result: US users aged 25-45 who are interested in Entrepreneurship AND are Engaged Shoppers.

section.title: Flexible Targeting (OR Logic)
section.p: Use flexible_spec to apply OR logic within the interest/behavior layer.

example.note: Result: users who match ANY of the listed interests.
Result: (Interest A) OR (Interest B AND Behavior C) — useful for narrowing broad interests with behavioral signals.
